message:
fix(cli): cosign v2 identity flags + is_writable parent dir check

- mod.rs: probe_sigstore_bundle() now passes --certificate-oidc-issuer
  and --certificate-identity-regexp required by cosign v2.x for keyless
  verification; without these flags verification always failed silently
- integrations.rs: is_writable() for non-existent paths now checks
  parent directory writability via access(W_OK) instead of just existence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
